joined_reference: <bos>the film 's hackneyed message is not helped by the thin characterizations , nonexistent plot and pretentious visual style .  <bos>the vitality of the actors keeps the intensity of the film high , even as the strafings blend together .  <bos>tries to add some spice to its quirky sentiments but the taste is all too familiar .  <bos>a must-see for the david mamet enthusiast and for anyone who appreciates intelligent , stylish moviemaking .
